response.justification: Bogdan Szabo significantly exceeds the seniority requirement (16+ years, currently Staff level) and demonstrates strong full-stack capability across TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, and testing practices. His current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly addressing a core required skill. The primary concern is lack of explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though his deep Node.js and testing expertise suggest these would be learnable. Java/Kotlin experience is dated. Overall, he is an exceptionally strong senior engineer whose foundational skills and current AI-agent focus align well with the role.
